templates.title: Introducing how Plan with Care works with Solicitors
templates.subject: Introducing how Plan with Care works with Solicitors
templates.body:
XXX perhaps we can have a call to understand each other's work better and see if there are any opportunities to support each other.

To give you a bit more info, Thrive Homecare is part of Plan with Care, a quality-of-life focused care and wellbeing service for vulnerable and older people. We work with solicitors to support vulnerable clients by providing health and welfare advice and services. We work with a number of the private clients teams in East Kent and London, Whithead Monkton, Furley Page, Brachers, Warners, Girlings to name a few.

Our services include fully managed care at home, wellbeing support, liaison with health and social care professionals, fixed-cost mental capacity assessments, COP3 assessments. We tailor plans that reduce solicitors' nonchargeable administrative burden while enhancing the support you offer clients. More info here For Solicitors | Plan with Care

If you'd like to chat when would be good for you?

Kind regards,
Chris
